description_long: This is a modern four-door sedan with a streamlined body and a robust front grille guard, suggesting it may be used for security or law enforcement purposes. The vehicle features tinted windows, a subtle rear spoiler, and a set of five-spoke alloy wheels. The rear of the car is equipped with a continuous red taillight bar and dual exhausts, enhancing its sporty appearance. The body is finished in a matte gray color, giving it a subdued yet authoritative look. The side profile reveals flush door handles and a gently sloping roofline, contributing to its aerodynamic design. The overall build appears sturdy, with visible details such as side mirrors, door seams, and a reinforced front bumper.
description: A matte gray, four-door sedan with a robust front grille guard, tinted windows, and five-spoke alloy wheels, featuring a continuous rear taillight bar and sporty design cues.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent grille guard, hood contours, and tinted windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, flush handles, alloy wheels, and sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous red taillight bar, dual exhausts, and subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same door and wheel details.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke, star-shaped, dark alloy wheels with a solid, sporty appearance
